message: Add Okta System Log package with OCSF mapping (#136)

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,6 @@
+---
+name: Show Okta Events
+description: Subscribe to and display Okta System Log events
+---
+
+subscribe "okta"

@@ -0,0 +1,14 @@
+---
+description: Normalize sentinel values in Okta System Log events
+---
+
+// Replace sentinel strings with null.
+replace what="null", with=null
+replace what="unknown", with=null
+replace what="None", with=null
+replace what="UNKNOWN", with=null
+
+// Coerce securityContext.asNumber from string to int when present.
+if securityContext?.asNumber? != null {
+  securityContext.asNumber = int(securityContext.asNumber)
+}

@@ -0,0 +1,26 @@
+---
+description: Fetches Okta system logs via HTTP
+args:
+  positional:
+   - name: domain
+     type: string
+  named:
+   - name: limit
+     type: int
+     default: 200
+   - name: bearer_token
+     type: secret
+   - name: swss_token
+     type: secret
+---
+
+// See:
+// - https://developer.okta.com/docs/api/
+// - https://developer.okta.com/docs/api/openapi/okta-management/guides/overview/
+
+let $endpoint = f"https://{$domain}/api/v1/logs?limit={$limit}"
+let $auth = f"Bearer {$bearer_token}" if $bearer_token != null else f"SWSS {$swss_token}"
+
+from_http $endpoint, headers={Authorization: $auth}, paginate="link" {
+  read_json
+}

@@ -0,0 +1,43 @@
+---
+description: "Okta → OCSF Base Event (0)"
+---
+
+// --- Preamble ---------------------------------
+
+this = {okta: this}
+
+// --- OCSF: classification attributes ----------
+
+ocsf.activity_id = 0
+ocsf.category_uid = 0
+ocsf.class_uid = 0
+ocsf.severity_id = 0
+ocsf.type_uid = 0
+
+// --- OCSF: context attributes -----------------
+
+ocsf.time = time(move okta.published)
+ocsf.message = move okta.displayMessage
+ocsf.metadata = {
+  event_code: move okta.eventType,
+  log_provider: "Okta",
+  product: {
+    name: "Okta",
+    vendor_name: "Okta",
+  },
+  profiles: ["cloud"],
+  version: "1.7.0",
+}
+
+// --- OCSF: cloud attributes -------------------
+
+ocsf.cloud = {
+  provider: "Other",
+}
+
+// --- Epilogue ---------------------------------
+
+this = {...ocsf, unmapped: okta}
+@name = "ocsf.base_event"
+drop_null_fields unmapped
+ocsf::derive

@@ -0,0 +1,22 @@
+---
+description: Shared Okta OCSF epilogue (cleanup, finalize, derive)
+---
+
+// Drop common Okta fields already consumed by map_common or the event mapper.
+// Fields that were fully moved earlier become harmless no-ops here.
+drop okta.severity?
+drop okta.legacyEventType?
+if okta.debugContext? != null {
+  drop okta.debugContext.debugData.threatSuspected?
+  drop okta.debugContext.debugData.responseTime?
+}
+drop okta.target?
+drop okta.client?
+drop okta.securityContext?
+drop okta.request?
+drop okta.transaction?
+drop okta.authenticationContext?
+
+this = {...ocsf, unmapped: okta}
+drop_null_fields unmapped
+ocsf::derive

+  "user.account.update_user_type": 99,
+  "user.mfa.factor.activate": 99,

+ocsf.activity_id = $activity_map[okta.eventType]? else 99

@@ -0,0 +1,116 @@
+---
+description: "Okta → OCSF Authentication (3002)"
+---
+
+// --- Preamble ---------------------------------
+
+this = {okta: this}
+
+// --- OCSF: classification attributes ----------
+
+let $activity_map = {
+  "user.session.start": 1,
+  "user.session.end": 2,
+  "user.session.clear": 2,
+  "user.authentication.sso": 1,
+  "user.authentication.auth_via_mfa": 1,
+  "user.authentication.auth_via_radius": 1,
+  "user.authentication.auth_via_AD_agent": 1,
+  "user.authentication.auth_via_social": 1,
+  "user.authentication.auth_via_IDP": 1,
+  "user.authentication.slo": 2,
+  "user.authentication.verify": 1,
+  "user.session.access_admin_app": 1,
+  "policy.evaluate_sign_on": 1,
+  "app.generic.unauth_app_access_attempt": 1,
+  "application.policy.sign_on.deny_access": 1,
+  "app.oauth2.authorize": 1,
+  "app.oauth2.authorize.code": 1,
+  "system.push.send_factor_verify_push": 6,
+}
+ocsf.activity_id = $activity_map[okta.eventType]? else 0
+ocsf.category_uid = 3
+ocsf.class_uid = 3002
+ocsf.type_uid = ocsf.class_uid * 100 + ocsf.activity_id
+
+// Status with security control profile.
+let $status_map = {
+  SUCCESS: 1,
+  ALLOW: 1,
+  FAILURE: 2,
+  DENY: 2,
+  CHALLENGE: 99,
+}
+if okta.eventType == "application.policy.sign_on.deny_access" {
+  ocsf.status_id = 2
+} else {
+  ocsf.status_id = $status_map[okta.outcome.result?]? else 0
+}
+if okta.outcome.result == "SUCCESS" or okta.outcome.result == "ALLOW" {
+  ocsf.action_id = 1
+  ocsf.disposition_id = 1
+} else if okta.outcome.result == "FAILURE" or okta.outcome.result == "DENY" {
+  ocsf.action_id = 2
+  if okta.eventType == "app.generic.unauth_app_access_attempt" {
+    ocsf.disposition_id = 26
+  } else if string(okta.debugContext.debugData.threatSuspected?) == "true" {
+    ocsf.disposition_id = 2
+  } else {
+    ocsf.disposition_id = 2
+  }
+} else if okta.outcome.result == "CHALLENGE" {
+  ocsf.action_id = 99
+  ocsf.disposition_id = 16
+} else {
+  ocsf.action_id = 0
+  ocsf.disposition_id = 0
+}
+ocsf.status_detail = move okta.outcome.reason?
+drop okta.outcome?
+
+// Auth protocol.
+let $auth_protocol_map = {
+  "OpenID Connect": 4,
+  "SAML 2.0": 5,
+}
+if okta.debugContext.debugData.signOnMode? != null {
+  ocsf.auth_protocol_id = $auth_protocol_map[okta.debugContext.debugData.signOnMode]? else 99
+  drop okta.debugContext.debugData.signOnMode
+} else if okta.eventType == "user.authentication.auth_via_radius" {
+  ocsf.auth_protocol_id = 10
+}
+
+// --- OCSF: common attributes -----------------
+
+okta::ocsf::map_common
+
+ocsf.metadata.profiles = ["cloud", "security_control"]
+
+ocsf.session = {
+  uid: move okta.authenticationContext.externalSessionId?,
+}
+
+// --- OCSF: risk & alert ----------------------
+
+ocsf.risk_details = move okta.debugContext.debugData.behaviors?
+ocsf.is_alert = false
+if string(okta.debugContext.debugData.threatSuspected?) == "true" or okta.debugContext.debugData.threatDetections? != null {
+  ocsf.is_alert = true
+}
+
+// --- OCSF: target user from target[] ----------
+
+if okta.target? != null {
+  ocsf.user = okta.target.where(t => t.type == "User" or t.type == "AppUser").map(t => {
+    uid: t.id,
+    name: t.alternateId?.split("@")[0]?,
+    full_name: t.displayName,
+    email_addr: t.alternateId,
+    type_id: 1,
+  })[0]?
+}
+
+// --- Epilogue ---------------------------------
+
+okta::ocsf::epilogue
+@name = "ocsf.authentication"

@@ -0,0 +1,132 @@
+---
+description: "Okta → OCSF Detection Finding (2004)"
+---
+
+// --- Preamble ---------------------------------
+
+this = {okta: this}
+
+// --- OCSF: classification attributes ----------
+
+ocsf.activity_id = 1
+ocsf.category_uid = 2
+ocsf.class_uid = 2004
+ocsf.type_uid = ocsf.class_uid * 100 + ocsf.activity_id
+
+// NB: mirrors $severity_map in map_common.tql — keep in sync.
+let $severity_map = {
+  HIGH: 4,
+  MEDIUM: 3,
+  LOW: 2,
+}
+ocsf.severity_id = $severity_map[okta.debugContext.debugData.risk?]? else 1
+drop okta.debugContext.debugData.risk?
+
+let $status_map = {
+  SUCCESS: 1,
+  FAILURE: 2,
+  DENY: 2,
+}
+ocsf.status_id = $status_map[okta.outcome.result?]? else 0
+ocsf.status_detail = move okta.outcome.reason?
+drop okta.outcome?
+
+// --- OCSF: context attributes -----------------
+// NB: mirrors metadata/time in map_common.tql — keep in sync.
+// Detection findings don't use map_common because they embed actor and
+// src_endpoint inside evidences[] rather than at the top level.
+
+ocsf.time = time(move okta.published)
+ocsf.message = move okta.displayMessage
+
+ocsf.metadata = {
+  event_code: move okta.eventType,
+  log_provider: "Okta",
+  product: {
+    name: "Okta",
+    vendor_name: "Okta",
+    version: move okta.version?,
+  },
+  profiles: ["cloud"],
+  version: "1.7.0",
+  loggers: [{event_uid: okta.uuid?}],
+}
+
+// --- OCSF: finding_info -----------------------
+
+ocsf.finding_info = {
+  title: ocsf.metadata.event_code,
+  uid: move okta.uuid?,
+  desc: ocsf.message,
+}
+
+// --- OCSF: evidences[] -----------------------
+
+// NB: mirrors $actor_type_id in map_common.tql — keep in sync.
+let $actor_type_id = {
+  User: 1,
+  SystemPrincipal: 2,
+}
+
+let $device_type_map = {
+  Computer: "Desktop",
+  Mobile: "Mobile",
+}
+
+// Detection events always carry client context, so inline access is safe.
+ocsf.evidences = [{
+  actor: {
+    session: {
+      uid: okta.authenticationContext.externalSessionId?,
+      uid_alt: okta.authenticationContext.rootSessionId?,
+    },
+    user: {
+      uid: move okta.actor.id?,
+      name: okta.actor.alternateId?.split("@")[0]?,
+      domain: okta.actor.alternateId?.split("@")[1]?,
+      full_name: string(move okta.actor.displayName?),
+      email_addr: move okta.actor.alternateId?,
+      type_id: $actor_type_id[okta.actor.type?]? else 99,
+    },
+  },
+  src_endpoint: {
+    ip: move okta.client.ipAddress?,
+    uid: move okta.client.id?,
+    type: $device_type_map[move okta.client.device?]?,
+    domain: move okta.securityContext.domain?,
+    location: {
+      city: okta.client.geographicalContext?.city?,
+      country: okta.client.geographicalContext?.country?,
+      postal_code: okta.client.geographicalContext?.postalCode?,
+      lat: okta.client.geographicalContext?.geolocation?.lat?,
+      long: okta.client.geographicalContext?.geolocation?.lon?,
+      isp: move okta.securityContext.isp?,
+    },
+    autonomous_system: {
+      number: move okta.securityContext.asNumber?,
+    },
+    owner: {
+      org: {
+        name: move okta.securityContext.asOrg?,
+      },
+    },
+  },
+  http_request: {
+    uid: move okta.debugContext.debugData.requestId?,
+    url: {
+      path: move okta.debugContext.debugData.url?,
+      hostname: move okta.debugContext.debugData.authnRequestId? else move okta.debugContext.debugData.origin?,
+    },
+    user_agent: okta.client.userAgent?.rawUserAgent?,
+  },
+  data: okta.debugContext.debugData?,
+}]
+
+// --- Epilogue ---------------------------------
+
+// Detection findings consume actor and debugContext inline in evidences[],
+// so drop them before the shared epilogue.
+drop okta.actor?
+drop okta.debugContext?
+okta::ocsf::epilogue
+@name = "ocsf.detection_finding"

@@ -0,0 +1,130 @@
+---
+description: "Okta → OCSF Entity Management (3004)"
+---
+
+// --- Preamble ---------------------------------
+
+this = {okta: this}
+
+// --- OCSF: classification attributes ----------
+
+let $activity_map = {
+  // Policy events
+  "policy.lifecycle.create": 1,
+  "policy.lifecycle.update": 3,
+  "policy.lifecycle.delete": 4,
+  "policy.lifecycle.activate": 10,
+  "policy.lifecycle.deactivate": 11,
+  "policy.lifecycle.overwrite": 3,
+  "policy.rule.add": 1,
+  "policy.rule.update": 3,
+  "policy.rule.delete": 4,
+  "policy.rule.deactivate": 9,
+  "policy.rule.activate": 10,
+  "policy.rule.invalidate": 9,
+  "policy.rule.action.execute": 8,
+  "policy.mapping.create": 1,
+  // Application events
+  "application.lifecycle.create": 1,
+  "application.lifecycle.update": 3,
+  "application.lifecycle.delete": 4,
+  "application.lifecycle.deactivate": 11,
+  "application.user_membership.add": 1,
+  "application.user_membership.remove": 4,
+  "application.user_membership.update": 3,
+  "application.user_membership.restore": 2,
+  "application.policy.sign_on.rule.create": 1,
+  "application.policy.sign_on.rule.delete": 4,
+  "application.policy.sign_on.update": 3,
+  // Device events
+  "device.enrollment.create": 6,
+  "device.lifecycle.activate": 2,
+  "device.user.add": 1,
+  "device.user.remove": 4,
+  "device.assurance.policy.add": 1,
+  "device.assurance.policy.update": 3,
+  "device.assurance.policy.delete": 4,
+  // Zone events
+  "zone.lifecycle.create": 1,
+  "zone.lifecycle.update": 3,
+  "zone.lifecycle.delete": 4,
+  "zone.activate": 10,
+  "zone.deactivate": 11,
+  "zone.remove_blacklist": 3,
+  // Directory events
+  "directory.app_user_profile.bootstrap": 1,
+  "directory.app_user_profile.update": 3,
+  "directory.mapping.update": 3,
+  // Trusted origin events
+  "security.trusted_origin.create": 1,
+  "security.trusted_origin.activate": 10,
+}
+ocsf.activity_id = $activity_map[okta.eventType]? else 99
+ocsf.category_uid = 3
+ocsf.class_uid = 3004
+ocsf.type_uid = ocsf.class_uid * 100 + ocsf.activity_id
+
+let $status_map = {
+  SUCCESS: 1,
+  FAILURE: 2,
+}
+ocsf.status_id = $status_map[okta.outcome.result?]? else 0
+ocsf.status_detail = move okta.outcome.reason?
+drop okta.outcome?
+
+// --- OCSF: common attributes -----------------
+
+okta::ocsf::map_common
+
+// --- OCSF: entity from target[] ---------------
+
+// Route entity extraction by event type prefix since target[] contains
+// different object types depending on the Okta event category.
+if okta.target? != null {
+  if ocsf.metadata.event_code.starts_with("policy.") {
+    ocsf.entity = okta.target.where(t => t.type == "PolicyEntity").map(t => {
+      uid: t.id,
+      name: t.displayName,
+    })[0]?
+    ocsf.entity.type_id = 5
+    ocsf.entity.policy = {
+      desc: move okta.debugContext.debugData.policyType?,
+    }
+  } else if ocsf.metadata.event_code.starts_with("application.") {
+    ocsf.entity = okta.target.where(t => t.type == "AppInstance" or t.type == "AppUser").map(t => {
+      uid: t.id,
+      name: t.displayName,
+    })[0]?
+    ocsf.entity.type_id = 6
+  } else if ocsf.metadata.event_code.starts_with("device.") {
+    ocsf.entity = okta.target.where(t => t.type == "UDDevice").map(t => {
+      uid: t.id,
+      name: t.displayName,
+    })[0]?
+    ocsf.entity.type_id = 1
+  } else if ocsf.metadata.event_code.starts_with("zone.") {
+    ocsf.entity = okta.target.where(t => t.type == "NetworkZoneEntity").map(t => {
+      uid: t.id,
+      name: t.displayName,
+    })[0]?
+    ocsf.entity.type_id = 9
+    ocsf.entity.data = move okta.debugContext.debugData.zoneData?
+  } else if ocsf.metadata.event_code.starts_with("directory.") {
+    ocsf.entity = okta.target.where(t => t.type == "AppUser").map(t => {
+      uid: t.id,
+      name: t.displayName,
+    })[0]?
+    ocsf.entity.type_id = 99
+  } else if ocsf.metadata.event_code.starts_with("security.trusted_origin.") {
+    ocsf.entity = okta.target.where(t => t.type == "TrustedOrigin").map(t => {
+      uid: t.id,
+      name: t.displayName,
+    })[0]?
+    ocsf.entity.type_id = 7
+  }
+}
+
+// --- Epilogue ---------------------------------
+
+okta::ocsf::epilogue
+@name = "ocsf.entity_management"

+---
+description: "Okta → OCSF Group Management (3006)"
+---
+
+// --- Preamble ---------------------------------
+
+this = {okta: this}
+
+// --- OCSF: classification attributes ----------
+
+let $activity_map = {
+  "group.lifecycle.create": 1,
+  "group.user_membership.add": 3,
+  "group.user_membership.remove": 4,
+  "group.lifecycle.delete": 5,
+  "group.privilege.grant": 99,
+  "group.application_assignment.add": 99,
+  "group.application_assignment.remove": 99,
+  "group.application_assignment.update": 99,
+  "group.user_membership.rule.add_exclusion": 99,
+}
+ocsf.activity_id = $activity_map[okta.eventType]? else 99
+ocsf.category_uid = 3
+ocsf.class_uid = 3006
+ocsf.type_uid = ocsf.class_uid * 100 + ocsf.activity_id
+
+let $status_map = {
+  SUCCESS: 1,
+  FAILURE: 2,
+}
+ocsf.status_id = $status_map[okta.outcome.result?]? else 0
+ocsf.status_detail = move okta.outcome.reason?
+drop okta.outcome?
+
+// --- OCSF: common attributes -----------------
+
+okta::ocsf::map_common
+
+// --- OCSF: group and user from target[] -------

+---
+description: Okta → OCSF
+---
+
+okta::clean
+
+if eventType.starts_with("user.session.") or
+   eventType.starts_with("user.authentication.") or
+   eventType == "policy.evaluate_sign_on" or
+   eventType == "system.push.send_factor_verify_push" or
+   eventType == "application.policy.sign_on.deny_access" or
+   eventType.starts_with("app.generic.unauth_app_access_attempt") or
+   eventType.starts_with("app.oauth2.authorize") {
+  okta::ocsf::event::authentication
+} else if eventType == "user.account.report_suspicious_activity_by_enduser" {
+  okta::ocsf::event::detection_finding
+} else if eventType.starts_with("user.lifecycle.") or
+          eventType.starts_with("user.account.") or
+          eventType.starts_with("user.mfa.factor.") {
+  okta::ocsf::event::account_change
+} else if eventType.starts_with("group.") {
+  okta::ocsf::event::group_management
+} else if eventType == "security.threat.detected" or
+          eventType == "user.mfa.attempt_bypass" or
+          eventType == "security.protected_action.attempt" {
+  okta::ocsf::event::detection_finding
+} else if eventType.starts_with("system.api_token.") or
+          eventType.starts_with("app.oauth2.token.") or
+          eventType.starts_with("app.oauth2.client.") or
+          eventType.starts_with("app.oauth2.credentials.") or
+          eventType == "application.configuration.read_client_secret" or
+          eventType.starts_with("system.idp.lifecycle.") or
+          eventType.starts_with("system.log_stream.") or
+          eventType.starts_with("workflows.") {
+  okta::ocsf::event::api_activity
+} else if eventType.starts_with("application.") or
+          eventType.starts_with("policy.") or
+          eventType.starts_with("zone.") or
+          eventType.starts_with("device.") or
+          eventType.starts_with("directory.") or
+          eventType.starts_with("security.trusted_origin.") {
+  okta::ocsf::event::entity_management
+} else {
+  okta::ocsf::base
+}

+---
+description: Maps common Okta System Log fields to OCSF.
+---
+
+// --- OCSF: classification attributes ----------
+
+let $severity_map = {
+  HIGH: 4,
+  MEDIUM: 3,
+  LOW: 2,
+}
+ocsf.severity_id = $severity_map[okta.debugContext.debugData.risk?]? else 1
+drop okta.debugContext.debugData.risk?
+
+// --- OCSF: occurrence attributes ---------------
+
+ocsf.time = time(move okta.published)
+ocsf.message = move okta.displayMessage
+
+// --- OCSF: context attributes -----------------
+
+ocsf.metadata = {
+  event_code: move okta.eventType,
+  log_provider: "Okta",
+  product: {
+    name: "Okta",
+    vendor_name: "Okta",
+    version: move okta.version?,
+  },
+  profiles: ["cloud"],
+  version: "1.7.0",
+  loggers: [{event_uid: move okta.uuid?}],
+}
+
+ocsf.http_request = {
+  uid: move okta.debugContext.debugData.requestId?,
+  url: {
+    path: move okta.debugContext.debugData.url?,
+    hostname: move okta.debugContext.debugData.authnRequestId? else move okta.debugContext.debugData.origin?,
+  },
+}
+if okta.client.userAgent? != null {
+  ocsf.http_request.user_agent = move okta.client.userAgent.rawUserAgent?
+}
+
+// --- OCSF: cloud attributes -------------------
+
+ocsf.cloud = {
+  provider: "AWS" if okta.source?.contains("aws.partner") else "Other",
+  region: move okta.region?,
+}
+
+// --- OCSF: actor attributes -------------------
+
+let $actor_type_id = {
+  User: 1,
+  SystemPrincipal: 2,
+}
+
+ocsf.actor = {
+  user: {
+    uid: move okta.actor.id?,
+    name: okta.actor.alternateId?.split("@")[0]?,
+    domain: okta.actor.alternateId?.split("@")[1]?,
+    full_name: move okta.actor.displayName?,
+    email_addr: move okta.actor.alternateId?,
+    type_id: $actor_type_id[okta.actor.type?]? else 99,
+  },
+  session: {
+    uid: okta.authenticationContext.externalSessionId?,
+    uid_alt: move okta.authenticationContext.rootSessionId?,
+  },
+}
+drop okta.actor?
+
+// --- OCSF: src_endpoint -----------------------
+
+let $device_type_map = {
+  Computer: "Desktop",
+  Mobile: "Mobile",
+}
+
+ocsf.src_endpoint = {
+  ip: move okta.client.ipAddress?,
+  uid: move okta.client.id?,
+  type: $device_type_map[move okta.client.device?]?,
+  domain: move okta.securityContext.domain?,
+  autonomous_system: {
+    number: move okta.securityContext.asNumber?,
+  },
+  owner: {
+    org: {
+      name: move okta.securityContext.asOrg?,
+    },
+  },
+}
+ocsf.src_endpoint.location.isp = move okta.securityContext.isp?
+if okta.client.geographicalContext? != null {
+  ocsf.src_endpoint.location.city = move okta.client.geographicalContext.city?
+  ocsf.src_endpoint.location.country = move okta.client.geographicalContext.country?
+  ocsf.src_endpoint.location.postal_code = move okta.client.geographicalContext.postalCode?
+  ocsf.src_endpoint.location.lat = move okta.client.geographicalContext.geolocation?.lat?
+  ocsf.src_endpoint.location.long = move okta.client.geographicalContext.geolocation?.lon?
+}
+
+// --- OCSF: src_endpoint OS from userAgent ------
+
+// Okta reports "Mac OS X (iPhone)" for iPhones, so check for mobile OS
+// indicators before the generic "Mac" match.
+let $os_type_map = {
+  iOS: {name: "iOS", type_id: 301},
+  iPadOS: {name: "iPadOS", type_id: 302},
+  Android: {name: "Android", type_id: 201},
+  Windows: {name: "Windows", type_id: 100},
+  macOS: {name: "macOS", type_id: 300},
+  Linux: {name: "Linux", type_id: 200},
+  ChromeOS: {name: "ChromeOS", type: "ChromeOS", type_id: 99},
+}
+if okta.client.userAgent?.os? != null {
+  if okta.client.userAgent.os.contains("iPhone") or okta.client.userAgent.os == "iOS" { ocsf.src_endpoint.os = $os_type_map["iOS"] }
+  else if okta.client.userAgent.os.contains("iPad") or okta.client.userAgent.os == "iPadOS" { ocsf.src_endpoint.os = $os_type_map["iPadOS"] }
+  else if okta.client.userAgent.os.contains("Android") { ocsf.src_endpoint.os = $os_type_map["Android"] }
+  else if okta.client.userAgent.os.contains("Windows") { ocsf.src_endpoint.os = $os_type_map["Windows"] }
+  else if okta.client.userAgent.os.contains("Mac") { ocsf.src_endpoint.os = $os_type_map["macOS"] }
+  else if okta.client.userAgent.os.contains("Linux") or okta.client.userAgent.os.contains("Ubuntu") { ocsf.src_endpoint.os = $os_type_map["Linux"] }
+  else if okta.client.userAgent.os.contains("ChromeOS") or okta.client.userAgent.os.contains("Chrome OS") or okta.client.userAgent.os.contains("CrOS") { ocsf.src_endpoint.os = $os_type_map["ChromeOS"] }
+}

+id: okta
+name: Okta
+author: Tenzir
+author_icon: https://raw.githubusercontent.com/tenzir/library/main/.tenzir.svg
+package_icon: |
+  https://raw.githubusercontent.com/tenzir/library/main/okta/package.svg
+description: |
+  [Okta](https://www.okta.com/) is a cloud-based identity and access management
+  platform that provides single sign-on, multi-factor authentication, and
+  lifecycle management for enterprise applications.
+
+  This package enables ingestion and processing of Okta System Log events,
+  providing visibility into authentication activity, account changes, group
+  management, and security findings across your organization. The package
+  includes OCSF mapping pipelines that transform Okta events into standardized
+  formats, making it easy to correlate identity data with other security tools
+  in your environment.
+categories:
+- mappings
+- sources
+
+inputs:
+  api-domain:
+    name: API Domain
+    description: |
+      Your Okta domain (e.g., example.okta.com). This is used to construct
+      the Okta System Log API endpoint.
+    type: string
+
+  api-token:
+    name: API Token
+    description: An Okta API token with permission to read the System Log.
+    type: string

+---
+name: "Okta System Log: HTTP Receiver"
+description: >-
+  Polls the Okta System Log API for new events.
+disabled: true
+---
+
+let $domain = "{{ inputs.api-domain }}"
+// This pipeline uses SSWS auth via package inputs. For ad-hoc use with
+// Bearer or SWSS tokens, see the okta::fetch operator instead.
+every 30s {
+  okta::fetch $domain
+}
+publish "okta"
